underlying_goal: Redesign the travel planner's journey/transport system from a complex segment-based builder to a simplified day-page timeline approach, producing both a design doc and implementation plan
friction_detail: Implementation plan hit the 32K output token limit, requiring it to be split into two files.
brief_summary: User wanted to redesign the complex journey builder into a simple day-page timeline with transport items; Claude collaboratively designed the system, wrote a design doc, and produced an implementation plan before hitting the usage limit.
